potential_missing.source_sentence: A user enters the platform by registering or signing in.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow users to register or sign in to access the platform.
The system shall enable users to search for products after they have registered or logged in.
The system shall redirect the user to the official website of the selected product upon selection.

missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall update the displayed product results based on the applied filters.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
